title: Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli
tagline: Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Panchalingeshwara Temple (also spelt Panchalingeshvara) in Govindanahalli, Mandya district, Karnataka state, India, was constructed around 1238 A.D.
overview.description: Panchalingeshwara Temple (also spelt Panchalingeshvara) in Govindanahalli, Mandya district, Karnataka state, India, was constructed around 1238 A.D. during the reign of the Hoysala empire King Vira Someshwara. The name "Panchalingeshwara" literally means "five linga" (pancha - five and linga - the universal symbol of the god Shiva). The temple is protected as a monument of national importance by the Archaeological Survey of India. The famous sculptor of Hoysala times, Ruvari Mallitamma, is known to have made contributions to the temple.

topPlaces.name: Brahmeshvara Temple, Kikkeri
topPlaces.description: The Brahmeshvara temple, also referred to as the Brahmeshwara or Brahmesvara temple, is a 12th-century Hindu temple with Hoysala architecture in Kikkeri village, Mandya district of Karnataka state, India. Along with two other major historic temples within the village, the Brahmeshvara temple is one of many major ruined temples with notable artwork in Kikkeri area close to the more famous monuments of Shravanabelagola.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli?
faq.a: Stays in Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Panchalingeshwara temple, Govindanahalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Govindanahalli, Kikkeri, Dabbeghatta, Brahmeshvara Temple, Kikkeri, Mandagere.
